user.title: Connect to MyElectrica
user.description: Enter your MyElectrica email and password.

select_nlc.title: Select consumption locations to monitor
select_nlc.description: You can monitor all consumption locations or only specific ones. Select what you want to track.

error.auth_failed: Authentication failed. Check your email and password.
error.no_data: Authentication successful, but no data found for this account.
error.no_nlc_selected: You must select at least one consumption location or enable the option for all.

abort.already_configured: This MyElectrica account is already configured.

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.description: Update your credentials and refresh interval.

licenta.title: MyElectrica License
licenta.description:
{license_status}

Enter your license key to activate or renew the integration.

select_nlc.title: Select consumption locations to monitor
select_nlc.description: Update the consumption locations you want to monitor.

error.auth_failed: Authentication failed. Check your email and password.
error.no_data: Authentication successful, but no data found for this account.
error.no_nlc_selected: You must select at least one consumption location or enable the option for all.
error.license_key_invalid: Invalid license key. Check the format and try again.
error.license_already_used: This license key has already been used on another installation.
error.license_fingerprint_mismatch: This license key is bound to a different installation.
error.license_network_error: Cannot connect to the license server. Check your internet connection.
error.license_server_error: License server error. Please try again later.

trial_expired.title: Trial expired — MyElectrica România
trial_expired.description:
The free trial period has ended.

Sensors are disabled until a license is obtained.

[Get a license now]({learn_more_url})

license_expired.title: License expired — MyElectrica România
license_expired.description:
The license for this integration has expired.

Sensors are disabled until the license is renewed.

[Renew license]({learn_more_url})
